rows.label: qev025501_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Good grief... Starting a repair shop
for Earthlings was a huge mistake...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0002
rows.name:
I go through the trouble of fixing things for them, and
they just wreck them again one after another... What do
they think a machine crafted by someone's hands is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hm... What is it? Did you come
to ask me for a repair too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sorry, but my hands are completely full,
aren't they. I don't think I'll be able
to take on any new jobs for a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say you don't have anything
that needs repairing.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if he harbors hatred
toward Earthlings.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Is that so. Then don't come back, okay.
I've got to somehow gather the materials
needed for repairs, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmph... I've got to clean up the
messes made by you Earthlings who
don't take care of your things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0007
rows.name:
If I hated you, I wouldn't have started a repair
shop here. It's just... I've realized Earthlings
care about their belongings even less than I thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm just saying it's starting to feel
ridiculous working so hard to repair
machines for people like that, aren't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0009
rows.name:
You're the same, aren't you? You just
see machines as convenient consumables
to be used and thrown away, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0031
rows.name: Say they are just consumables.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0041
rows.name:
Shake your head and say they
aren't just consumables.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0010
rows.name:
For a Ma-non who's been tinkering with
machines since childhood, that way of
thinking is unbelievable, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Don't forget that even silent machines
have the souls of the people who built
and maintained them inside...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0012
rows.name:
That's a rare perspective for an
Earthling, isn't it. Exactly.
Machines aren't just simple tools.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0013
rows.name:
They've got the souls of the people who built
and maintained them inside, you see. They
aren't something to be treated poorly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmph... Well, whatever. I have to go
look for repair materials now, don't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you don't have any business with me,
please move along. I'm busy, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0050
rows.name: Leave

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0051
rows.name: Leave the area.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0060
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0061
rows.name: Offer to go get the materials for him.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0016
rows.name: ...See you around, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Now then... Which poor machine should
I restore to working order next...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0018
rows.name:
...What was that? Why would you help
me? Is it pity? Or something else?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Tch... I don't know what you're thinking,
but... If you're going to do it, I might
as well let you, shouldn't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's not an easy job, you know. Even to fix
a single kitchen appliance, you have to go
outside NLA and gather all sorts of parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hey... Earthling. Are you really
sure you still want to do this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0022
rows.name:
I get it... then give it a try.
But if you're going to help,
no half-measures allowed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0023
rows.name:
It might look like just a machine to
you, but what I'm repairing is a genuine
living creature to me, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Go fetch some shiny new parts for this poor,
busted kitchen appliance! Hmph... I'll be
waiting without getting my hopes up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0025
rows.name:
If I just had Stripped Plating and
Quality Fuse Parts, I could repair
this busted kitchen appliance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's a hard worker that's supported Earthlings'
lives even after being thrown onto a strange planet
like this. I have to fix it up properly, don't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hmph... You couldn't get the
Stripped Plating or the Quality
Fuse Parts after all, could you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Well, I wasn't expecting much
anyway. If you couldn't do it,
hurry up and disappear from here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Wh-! What did you say?! You actually
went outside NLA and braved the danger
just to get these for this thing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0030
rows.name:
You're... different from the other
Earthlings who just treat machines
like garbage... aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0071
rows.name:
Say that things should
be treated with care.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0081
rows.name:
Insist you're no different
from other Earthlings.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0031
rows.name:
It's true, your eyes... They don't
look like the eyes of a liar...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Are all Earthlings really like you...?
Then why do they use things with so little
love and toss the broken pieces at me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Is it because they don't have any breathing room
living on Mira? You're saying that deep down, Earthlings
actually do have the heart to cherish things?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0034
rows.name:
I-I... I won't believe it...
Ever since coming here, the
Earthlings have always...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Sostenasa! Have you finished
repairing the two military vehicles
I asked you about before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Brother... If I recall... those
were the military vehicles totaled
by the BLADEs, weren't they...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0037
rows.name:
I'm sorry... I'm missing some parts, so
I haven't been able to fix them yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0038
rows.name:
The Earthlings are managing to make do
with what few resources they have, you
know? You should learn from them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Good grief... If you're going to be this slow, I'll
use you as a test subject for my inventions like the
old days. I'm developing a flamethrower right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0040
rows.name:
S-Stop it! The oil is one thing, but Earth-made
Windshield Glass is incredibly hard to come
by! I'm having a tough time here too...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0090
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0091
rows.name: Offer to go get the materials.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0100
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0101
rows.name: Watch the situation silently.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0041
rows.name:
The Earthlings need those military vehicles
immediately. Now, what will it be? Repair
them? Or the flamethrower? Well?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0042
rows.name:
Ahh... I get it! I'll make repairing
the military vehicles my top priority.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0043
rows.name:
...So because of that, I have to
head out immediately, don't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0044
rows.name:
This is thanks for earlier...
Just take it for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Hmph... I've realized that at
least a few Earthlings are
actually decent, haven't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0046
rows.name:
You do your best out there too,
alright. ...See you around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Eh... You're going to
go get them for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0048
rows.name:
Why would you go that far? This
is my job. You have no reason
to do this much, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0110
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0111
rows.name:
Say it's only natural for NLA
residents to help each other.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0120
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0121
rows.name: Say you just don't have a reason.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0049
rows.name:
Damn it... You're the first person to
ever say something like that to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0050
rows.name:
But you're really going to help
me, are you? What are you, anyway...
Are you really an Earthling?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0051
rows.name:
No... maybe I just looked at the surface of
Earthlings and selfishly assumed they were
people who didn't value their things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0052
rows.name:
Was I just taking my stress out on them
because work was incredibly busy...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0053
rows.name: Tch...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0054
rows.name:
No... anyway, please bring me the parts. While
you're getting the parts for the military vehicles,
I'll fix up that kitchen appliance perfectly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0055
rows.name:
The parts needed to repair the military vehicles
are Honey Oil dropped by Vasalts, and Windshield
Glass left behind in scrapped cars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0056
rows.name:
I've heard there are scrapped cars
out in the plains by the East Gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0057
rows.name:
I fixed that kitchen appliance
so it's as good as new and
sent it back to its owner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0058
rows.name:
Apparently, a badly injured BLADE was struggling
because she couldn't even cook properly without
it... Hmph... I'm glad I was able to fix it quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0059
rows.name:
...So how did it go? Honey Oil and
Windshield Glass... Did you get the
parts for the military vehicles?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0060
rows.name:
Those aren't things you can get your
hands on easily... You must have had a
hard time getting them, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0130
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0131
rows.name: Say it was a lot of trouble.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0140
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0141
rows.name: Tell him it was easy.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0061
rows.name:
I figured as much... But why would you
go to such lengths just to help me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0062
rows.name:
You can say that, but I know better. After
all, I've nearly died countless times
trying to get my hands on that stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0063
rows.name:
Tch... Why would you go to such
lengths just to help me...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0064
rows.name:
...What? You couldn't just turn
a blind eye since I was repairing
them for BLADEs... you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0065
rows.name: Damn it... You idiot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0066
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0067
rows.name: ...I get it! I lose![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0068
rows.name:
...Why do you think my brother works as
a mechanic for Earthlings in BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0069
rows.name:
...Why do you think I decided to start
a repair shop for Earthlings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0070
rows.name:
It's simple! Because I thought that
on this planet, we could survive if
we joined hands with the Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0071
rows.name:
But I got so overwhelmingly busy with
work that I completely lost sight of
it... Such a simple reason...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0072
rows.name:
Tch... I'm not going to thank you...
I'm not a tactful enough Ma-non for
that. Just quietly take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0073
rows.name: Hmph... You're a BLADE, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0074
rows.name:
If so, I'm going to keep repairing,
repairing, and repairing every single
thing you guys wreck from now on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0075
rows.name:
So... you use those things to protect
our lives, alright. That's the...
method you just taught me, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0150
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0151
rows.name: Nod and agree.

rows.label: qev025501_JNK0160
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025501_SEL0161
rows.name: Shake your head and say that's not it.

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0076
rows.name:
We're supposed to be helping each other out,
yet I was acting like a victim... I won't
complain so shamefully anymore, I promise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0077
rows.name:
I see... So you helped me for a reason
I can't even begin to imagine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0078
rows.name:
Hmph... Even so, looking at
your face, I can understand
it wasn't for a bad reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025501_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Well, you do your best out
there too. I'll grit my teeth and
keep going with this job too![ST:wait ]
